title: Emancipation Proclamation
description: A Wikisource source card for the Emancipation Proclamation and Civil War history.

pages.text: The Emancipation Proclamation is a central Civil War document for studying executive power, slavery, military policy, and constitutional change.
Use this source for precise reading of legal language, historical geography, audience, limits, and consequences.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked work page for its specific license and source notes before assigning or mirroring.
